hero.title: Restore Old Photos with AI
hero.subtitle: No uploads. No server costs. Your photos never leave your device. Powered by AI running directly in your browser.

error.invalidFormat: Please select a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
error.fileTooLarge: Image is too large. Please select an image under 10MB.
error.largeFileWarn: Large image may take longer to process. Consider using a smaller image for faster results.
error.loadFailed: Failed to load image. Please try again.
error.processFailed: Failed to process image. Please try again.

features.title: Why Choose OldPhotoFixer?
features.card1Desc: Your photos never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser. No uploads, no servers, no data collection.
features.card2Desc: Process your photos in seconds. No waiting for server responses or dealing with upload failures.
features.card3Desc: No subscriptions, no credit packs, no watermarks. Restore as many photos as you want, completely free forever.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to select any old, blurry, or damaged photo from your device.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI model runs directly in your browser to enhance clarity, fix damage, and upscale your photo.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Compare the before and after, then download your restored photo in full quality.

cta.title: Ready to Restore Your Memories?
cta.desc: Bring your old photos back to life in seconds. No signup required.

noWebGL.title: Browser Not Supported
noWebGL.desc: Your browser doesn't support WebGL, which is required for AI photo processing. Please try a modern browser like Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.

meta.title: OldPhotoFixer - Free AI Old Photo Restoration in Browser
meta.description: Restore old, blurry, damaged photos instantly in your browser. Free, private, no uploads. AI-powered photo restoration without any server costs.
meta.keywords: old photo restoration, restore old photos, photo enhancer, AI photo restoration, free photo restoration
